title: NOVELTY PLACE Head Basketball Hoop Party Game Funny Toys Set for Kids & Adults - 2 Mini Basketball Adjustable Basketball Headband with 20 Balls - Red & White
features: ✔ COOL PARTY GAMES! - Looking for some great icebreakers for your party? This head hooping basketball game is definitely a must-have crowd pleaser, will keep your guests entertained and laughing all the way to the end.

✔ HOW TO PLAY - Can you throw in? Fasten the headband shooting basket on the head, you can try to toss the balls into the basket on the top your head. Or make it a head-to-head competition between multi players.

✔ ONE SIZE FITS ALL! - Headband can be adjusted approx. from 6-3/4" to 7-1/2" in diameter to fit for most kids and adults to wear. A perfect case to provide you with hours of fun indoors and outdoors.
✔ PACKAGE INCLUDES - Each package comes with 2 sets of head basketball hoop, 2 headbands, 2 hoops, 2 nets, 6 tubes, 10 white balls, 10 red balls, makes a great present to your loved kids and friends!
✔ Novelty Place Warranty - We stand behind our products! All items sold by us come with a 3-month warranty.
